creator: lbartoletti@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 212860
pekwm-0.1.17_5

x11-wm/pekwm: : Fix broken (unfetchable)

 * http://www.pewm.org is down but code has moved to https://github.com/pekdon/pekwm so USE_GITHUB
 * Add USES= autoreconf
 * Add missing USE_XORG= xinerama xrandr
 * Recreate patch with make makepatch

QA:

  * portlint: OK (looks fine.)
  * testport: OK (poudriere: 11/12/HEAD, i386/amd64 tested)
